attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway rider who exploits tactical situations rather than pure climbing power. Wins from breaks despite lacking elite climbing legs, relying on recovery ability and positioning over sustained power.
team_tactics: Operates with tactical discipline focused on jersey defense rather than stage hunting. Conserves energy strategically, avoiding premature responses to maintain classification position over multiple stages.
terrain_preference: Medium-difficulty climbs where mental resilience and tactical intelligence outweigh pure watts. Exposed on early accelerations and explosive gradients where genuine climbing strength determines selection.
vulnerability: Early accelerations and sudden pace changes on climbs reveal limitations in explosive power. Cannot match genuine climbers when tempo suddenly increases, requiring multiple recovery efforts.
key_patterns: Dropped multiple times but recovers: won after three drops, lost contact on early acceleration (2 instances)
KOM jersey pursuit via tactical positioning rather than climbing dominance (2 observations)
Exceptional mental resilience compensates for physical limitations on climbs (2 instances)
Tactical discipline in jersey defense, avoiding unnecessary energy expenditure (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: Mixed signals showing tactical intelligence and mental strength offset by physical limitations on climbs
